things.name: Capuchin Catacombs
things.description: Macabre corridors with 8,000 mummified monks and citizens in poses of life

things.name: Palazzo dei Normanni
things.description: Norman Palace housing the dazzling Palatine Chapel, a UNESCO World Heritage site

things.name: Ballarò Market
things.description: Palermo's oldest and most vibrant street market, the beating heart of the city

things.name: Quattro Canti
things.description: Baroque octagonal piazza where the four historic districts of the city intersect

things.name: Palermo Cathedral
things.description: Arab-Norman UNESCO masterpiece with royal tombs including Emperor Frederick II

things.name: La Martorana Church
things.description: 12th-century Byzantine church with original golden mosaics

things.name: Teatro Massimo
things.description: Italy's largest opera house, used for the baptism scene in The Godfather Part III

things.name: Mondello Beach
things.description: Palermo's favourite beach resort with a picturesque Liberty-style bathing establishment

things.name: Orto Botanico
things.description: 18th-century botanical garden with rare plants from around the Mediterranean

things.name: Cefalù
things.description: Stunning medieval town with Norman cathedral and beaches just 70km from Palermo
